description: The Pedigree Browser's \trim to focal animals\" option now includes descendants as well as ancestors"
`getPotentialParents()`'s dam-exclusion window is derived from each species' actual gestation length instead of a fixed heuristic
New `modPotentialParents` module surfaces `getPotentialParents()` in the app: a sortable candidate-parent table with CSV download

feature: ORIP grant-reporting tab wired in and ONPRC-gated
description: The pre-existing but never-mounted modORIPReporting module (site info, colony summary, genetic-diversity metrics, CSV downloads) is mounted, gated to ONPRC

feature: Species as a first-class pedigree attribute
description: A `species` column now drives species-keyed gestation windows and UI defaults, replacing a rhesus-only hardcoded scalar

feature: Mean-kinship correction for animals with an unknown parent
description: Genetic Value Analysis classifies each animal's parentage and corrects mean kinship / demotes both-unknown founders in the displayed rank
A 14-species minimum-breeding-age/gestation table backs Genetic Value Analysis and Potential Parents defaults, with per-session user overrides
Genome uniqueness (gu) reports 0, not an inflated score, for both-unknown-parentage \Undetermined\" founders"

feature: Founder genome equivalents reported with sampling uncertainty
description: `reportGV()` gains an `fgSE` column alongside `fg`, quantifying the estimate's sampling uncertainty
New `modGeneticDiversity` Shiny tab renders a group x metric red/yellow/green heatmap (proportion-low, origin, production, inbreeding-risk)

feature: Species-specific minimum breeding ages, end to end
description: Replaces a single flat minParentAge=2 default with sex- and species-specific minSireAge/minDamAge floors across QC, matching, and the Shiny UI
New exports (gene diversity, sex-ratio Ne, variance Ne) surface a colony's effective, not just census, population size
